name: Mountain Biking in Hatta - Biking Trails | Hatta, Dubai, UAE
snippet: Hatta MTB trail offers 60 bikes for hire, a 52-km trail with 4 challenge levels, and a fully equipped workshop, washing, and storage facility. Book today! Missing: length details features

name: Hatta Cycling Track UAE: Best Routes, Tips & Rentals
snippet: Spanning 53km of dedicated cycling paths (part of an 86km total trail system that includes walking routes), it's designed for off-road thrills ...

name: Stretching over 86 km, the Hatta Mountain Bike Trail offers a thrilling
snippet: Stretching over 86 km, the Hatta Mountain Bike Trail offers a thrilling experience to explore the beauty of the region's nature.
